player_notes.kevin durant: Officially ruled OUT for Game 5 vs. Lakers (left ankle sprain). Major absence — Houston will need others to fill scoring load.
player_notes.austin reaves: Game-time decision for Game 5 vs. Rockets (Grade 2 oblique strain, missed ~4 weeks). Lakers optimistic he returns; monitor final status closely.
player_notes.franz wagner: Uncertain for Game 5 (right calf strain); return depends on treatment response. If out, significant impact on Magic's scoring and minutes distribution.

game_notes.HOU vs LAL: Kevin Durant (ankle) is OUT for Houston. Austin Reaves is a game-time decision for LA — two star-level absences could heavily shift scoring props for teammates on both sides.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: Austin Reaves (LAL) — Grade 2 oblique strain (Apr 2 vs OKC, same game as Doncic). 4-6 week timeline. Per Charania (Apr 13): 'out for the majority of the first-round series; earliest first week of May.' 12-25% reinjury risk if rushed.
suggested_context_updates.conflict: Two news items from Apr 28 report: (1) Shams Charania reports Reaves is a game-time decision for Lakers in Game 5, and (2) sources say Lakers are optimistic for Reaves' return in Game 5 after missing ~four weeks with the Grade 2 oblique strain.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Update Reaves' status from 'out for the majority of the first-round series' to 'game-time decision for G5 (Apr 30); optimistic for return per sources.' If he plays G5, remove from confirmed-out list and note his return alongside any minutes restriction concern given the reinjury risk flag.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: Durant returned (23/6reb/4ast, 7-12 FG, 41 min) [G2]... Durant's ankle status (still QUES) remains the decisive series variable [G4 diary entry]. Durant was ruled OUT again (ankle injury, now listed QUES) [G3 diary].
suggested_context_updates.conflict: News from Apr 29 confirms: 'Rockets rule out Kevin Durant (ankle) for Game 5 vs. Lakers' — officially ruled out with a left ankle sprain. The injury is now confirmed as a left ankle sprain (context doc previously noted 'right knee contusion' for G1 absence and later referenced ankle generically).
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Update Durant's status to CONFIRMED OUT for G5 (left ankle sprain, officially ruled out Apr 29). Also clarify injury history: initial absence was right knee contusion (G1); current absence is left ankle sprain. Update the injury landscape section accordingly. The series diary G4 entry references him as 'still QUES' — superseded by official G5 ruling.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: The DET vs ORL series diary and injury landscape do not list Wagner with any current injury concern. Wagner is described as fully active: 'Wagner and Suggs: back from extended absences... Wagner on minutes restriction in play-in loss to PHI (12 pts) but looked sharper in CHA rout.' No injury flag exists for Wagner heading into G5.
suggested_context_updates.conflict: News from Apr 28 reports: 'Franz Wagner's status for Game 5 is uncertain due to a right calf strain, and his return will depend on how the injury responds to treatment, sources told ESPN.'
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Add Franz Wagner to the active injury concerns section: right calf strain, status uncertain for G5 (DET vs ORL). Flag as a primary availability variable for G5 and beyond. Note this is a new injury not previously documented in the context.

suggested_context_updates.player_or_team: LAL vs HOU — series context / Reaves role
suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: G4 diary: 'Reaves DNP (0/0/0, 0 min) — his continued absence means LAL's entire offensive burden remains on LeBron's shoulders with no secondary creator available.' Series intel: 'LAL without Doncic AND Reaves — LeBron (41) sole offensive engine.'
suggested_context_updates.conflict: Reaves is now a game-time decision for G5 and sources say LAL is optimistic about his return — meaning the 'sole offensive engine' framing and 'no secondary creator' characterization may no longer apply for G5.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Update G5 series preview to reflect Reaves' potential return. If he plays, LAL's offensive structure changes materially — LeBron is no longer the sole engine, and the series suppressor dynamics for HOU shift. Note the reinjury risk (12-25% per prior context) as a caveat on any minutes projection.
